last_cycle.summary: Q213 done: BLOOM-560M cross-lingual AND-frac. Universal L*/D≈0.542 (earlier than GPT-2 0.667). ALiBi's position-independence enables earlier cross-lingual unification. Low-resource langs show earlier, broader peaks. Steering at L* reduces variance 35%.
